name: Will — Personal Finance Overview
description: Personal finance dashboard — spending, budget discipline, net worth. Built from the Will Spending Model.

elements.body: # **Will'sPersonal Finance Overview** Spending, budget discipline & net worth — last two years

### How to read this page

**KPIs** show this month's spend vs last, your savings rate, current net worth, active subscription cost and travel spend so far this year. The **left chart** overlays each year's monthly spend so you can compare seasons (e.g. Dec 2024 vs Dec 2025). The **right chart** tracks net worth from account balances. Use the **date range** to rescope.

columns.formula: Sum(If(DateTrunc("month", [Transactions/Transaction Date]) = DateAdd("month", -1, DateTrunc("month", Today())), [Transactions/Spend Amount], 0))
columns.name: Spend Last Month

columns.formula: If(Sum([Transactions/Income Amount]) = 0, Null, (Sum([Transactions/Income Amount]) - Sum([Transactions/Spend Amount])) / Sum([Transactions/Income Amount]))
columns.name: Savings Rate

columns.formula: Sum(If([Account Balances/Balance Date] = [Account Balances/Latest Balance Date], [Account Balances/Balance], 0))
columns.name: Net Worth

columns.formula: Sum(If([Transactions/Category] = "Travel" and DatePart("year", [Transactions/Transaction Date]) = DatePart("year", Today()), [Transactions/Amount], 0))
columns.name: YTD Travel Spend

elements.body: # **Category Deep Dive** Where the money goes — actual vs budget, by category & subcategory

### ━━ How to read this page The **combo chart** shows actual spend (bars) against budget (line) per category over the range. The **pivot** breaks category → subcategory down by month; the **detail table** below lists the underlying transactions — both driven by the **Category** control. The **donut** shows spend split by payment method (income & transfers excluded). The **input table** is where you'll add a one-off expense or tweak a budget once write-back is wired up.

columns.formula: Sum(If([Budget Detail/Budget Month] <= DateTrunc("month", Today()), [Budget Detail/Budget Amount], 0))
columns.name: Budget

columns.formula: Sum(If(DateTrunc("month", [Transactions Detail/Transaction Date]) <= DateTrunc("month", Today()), [Transactions Detail/Amount], 0))
Lookup([Spend by Category/Actual Spend], [Category], [Spend by Category/Category])
columns.name: Actual Spend

elements.body: # **Travel & Geography** Where travel spend goes around the world

### ━━ How to read this page The **map** shades countries by travel spend; the **KPI** is travel spend so far this year; the **table** lists travel transactions. Defaults to the Travel category — change the control to explore another category geographically.

columns.formula: Sum(If([Transactions/Category] = "Travel" and DatePart("year", [Transactions/Transaction Date]) = DatePart("year", Today()), [Transactions/Amount], 0))
columns.name: YTD Travel Spend

elements.body:
## The story

- **Overview** — headline spend this month vs last, savings rate, net worth, subscription burden and travel-to-date, then seasonal spend overlaid by year and a net-worth trend.
- **Category Deep Dive** — actual vs budget per category, a category→subcategory→month pivot, the transaction detail behind it, and payment-method mix.
- **Travel & Geography** — travel spend mapped by country with the underlying trips.

The narrative: *am I spending within budget, is my net worth growing, and where is the money going?*

## Shown live — not in this build

Things the connector can't author but that demo live in Sigma:

- **Write-back** — the *Add Expense / Adjust Budget* input table on Page 2, wired to an action that writes to the warehouse.
- **Actions & workflows** — buttons to submit an expense, flag a transaction, or approve a budget change.
- **AI / Ask Sigma** — natural-language questions over this same model ("what did I spend on dining in Q2?").

*Write-back is wired live after this build.*
